name: Hemab Therapeutics Holdings, Inc.
business: Hemab Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing therapies for blood coagulation disorders, including Glanzmann thrombasthenia, Factor VII deficiency, and Von Willebrand Disease. Its lead assets are sutacimig (bispecific antibody) and HMB-002 (monovalent antibody), both in clinical trials. The company has no approved products and expects to commence a Phase 3 trial for sutacimig in Glanzmann thrombasthenia in the second half of 2026.
sellsTo: Geographies including United States, European Union, Japan, GCC countries and other select regions

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing therapies that reimagine the treatment of blood coagulation disorders to sustain life and human resilience.

catalysts.event: Commence Phase 3 clinical trial of sutacimig in Glanzmann thrombasthenia
catalysts.sentence: we expect to commence a Phase 3 clinical trial of sutacimig in Glanzmann thrombasthenia in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Report clinical data from Phase 2 trial of sutacimig in Factor VII deficiency
catalysts.sentence: we expect to report clinical data in late 2026 or early 2027.

catalysts.event: Report data from Phase 1/2 trial of HMB-002 in Von Willebrand Disease
catalysts.sentence: we expect to report data from our ongoing Phase 1/2 clinical trial in late 2026 or early 2027.

catalysts.event: First preclinical asset expected to enter clinical development
catalysts.sentence: the first of our preclinical assets is expected to enter the clinic in the second half of 2026, subject to regulatory submission and clearance.

catalysts.event: Report initial clinical data for first preclinical asset
catalysts.sentence: We plan to report initial clinical data for this asset in mid-2027.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 10,000 patients in aggregate with Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency in target geographies
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate there are approximately 10,000 patients in the aggregate with Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency in the geographies where we intend to commercialize sutacimig, including the United States, the European Union, Japan, the Gulf Cooperation Council, or GCC, countries and other select regions.

tamClaims.claim: Moderate-to-severe Von Willebrand Disease affects approximately 1 in 10,000 to 1 in 5,000 individuals globally
tamClaims.sentence: Moderate-to-severe levels of Von Willebrand Disease are estimated to affect approximately 1 in 10,000 to 1 in 5,000 individuals globally.

tamClaims.claim: In US, approximately 140,000 diagnosed Von Willebrand Disease patients, over 50,000 require treatment
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, there are approximately 140,000 patients who have been diagnosed with Von Willebrand Disease across all severity levels, of whom more than an estimated 50,000 require treatment for bleeding events.

tamClaims.claim: Aggregate of 10,000 patients with Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency and 120,000 with Von Willebrand Disease in target geographies
tamClaims.sentence: we estimate that there are approximately an aggregate of 10,000 patients with Glanzmann thrombasthenia and Factor VII deficiency and an aggregate of 120,000 patients with Von Willebrand Disease in the geographies where we intend to commercialize, including the United States, the European Union, Japan, the GCC countries and other select regions.
